title: Ores Drop Stone
description: A simple datapack that makes ore drop its respective stone type!
body:
Just a simple datapack that changes the block loot tables of ore to make them drop their respective stone type.

Compatible with [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [**Create Fly**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly). It also changes a few of the ore crushing recipes to reflect the new mining ones.

If you have any suggestions or issues please tell me [**here**](https://github.com/huxmybux/ODS/issues)!!!
